LanguageData.Pigeon_FallenAngel_Apparel.label: Sora's casual wear
LanguageData.Pigeon_FallenAngel_Apparel.description: This is a simple and neat white hoodie and jeans set. It's suitable for wearing at any time, and it's made of soft material, making it convenient to move around. The back of the hoodie has a hole, allowing the sleeves to be easily pulled out.
